samples.title: Chicken Butter Masala
steps: Add flour, soda, salt and eggs
samples.formatted:
Chicken Butter Masala

Ingredients:
- crust
- sugar
- butter
- eggs
- flour
- soda
- salt
- vanilla
- vinegar
- unbaked pie crust

Instructions:
1. Beat sugar and margarine
2. Add flour, soda, salt and eggs
3. Add vinegar and vanilla
4. Add sugar

samples.title: Chicken Butter Masala
steps: Cook broccoli and onion in butter until tender and remove
samples.formatted:
Chicken Butter Masala

Ingredients:
- broccoli
- butter
- onion
- Cheddar cheese

Instructions:
1. Cook broccoli and onion in butter until tender and remove
2. Add flour, salt and pepper
3. Add cheese, stirring, stirring well
4. Add broccoli
5. Cook for 5 minutes
6. Remove from heat
7. Add in broccoli
8. Cook until thick, stirring

samples.title: Chicken Butter Masala
samples.formatted:
Chicken Butter Masala

Ingredients:
- chicken
- margarine
- celery
- onion
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- butter
- cream of chicken soup

Instructions:
1. Put chicken in a pan
2. Add margarine
3. Add celery, salt and pepper
4. Cook until tender
5. Add onion, salt, pepper
